case_title: SICLLA, NORBERTO VS AZADKHANIAN, AZAD A. et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B. IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SICLLA, NORBERTO STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,800.00 FILED BY SICLLA, NORBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT AZADKHANIAN, AZAD A. ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-10-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTFD.MAIL TO JOSEPH B. ZAAROUR RETURNED SIGNED;
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION AUG-10-1999, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO AUG-25-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B. AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SICLLA, NORBERTO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-25-1999 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
CERTIFIED MAIL TO NORBERTO SICLLA RETURNED SIGNED
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B.
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION OF AUG-30-2001, DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B.
CERTFD.MAIL AZAD A. AZADKHANIAN RETURNED SIGNED;

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SICLLA, NORBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B. $3,800.00 PRINCIPAL, $26.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,826.00, JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF DEFENDANT, AZADKHANIAN, AZAD A. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CONTINUANCE IS FOR JUDGMENT CREDITOR SICLLA TO BRING A TRANSLATOR.
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, UNSATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AS TO DEFENDANT ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B. HEARING SET FOR AUG-16-2001 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506
NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED.
AND NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT DENIED AS TO DEFENDANT ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B.
DEBTOR'S REQUEST TO ENTER SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT DENIED WITHOUT PREJUDICE.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
EXHIBITS ORDERED DESTROYED
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $1,100.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED AS TO DEFENDANT ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B.
COPIES OF ORDER SENT TO PARTIES & A CERTIFIED COPY SENT TO THE LEVYING OFFICER.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF RECEIPT OF CLAIM OF EXEMPTION FROM THE SF SHERIFF DEPT, RECEIVED ON 8/6/01 & COPY OF NOTICE OF HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION
SC MOTION DISPOSITION NOTICE OF OPPOSITION TO AND HEARING ON CLAIM OF EXEMPTION CONTINUED FROM AUG-16-2001 TO AUG-30-2001 AT 11:00 AM IN DEPT 506 AS TO DEFENDANT ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B.
THE LEVYING OFFICER IS DIRECTED TO RELEASE ANY EARNINGS HELD TO THE JUDGMENT CREDITOR FOR PAYMENT ON THE JUDGMENT.
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $626.32 ACCRUED INTEREST, $104.00 ACCRUED COSTS AS TO DEFENDANT ZAAROUR, JOSEPH B.
SUBSTITUTION OF ATTORNEY FILED.
